dependencies.name: sqlcipher
dependencies.$comment: On macOS/Linux sqlcipher comes from brew/apt; on Windows vcpkg supplies it.

dependencies.name: pkgconf
dependencies.$comment: Windows lacks a system pkg-config; vcpkg provides the shim used by CMakeLists.

p2p.description: Direct peer-to-peer transport (QUIC over ICE). On Windows this adds an MSVC dependency via msquic.
